term_life_insurance.name: Term Life Insurance
term_life_insurance.nature: Pure life cover providing death benefit only
term_life_insurance.intended_for: Individuals aged 18-60 seeking affordable high life cover
term_life_insurance.premium_calculation: Current indicative rate is about 0.6% of the sum assured per year. For ₹50L coverage, annual premium is about ₹30,000 (≈₹2,500/month).

health_insurance.name: Comprehensive Health Insurance
health_insurance.nature: Medical indemnity cover for hospitalization and treatment
health_insurance.type: Indemnity health policy with cashless network
health_insurance.intended_for: Adults, families and senior citizens seeking hospital expense protection
health_insurance.premium_calculation: Current market rates are approximately ₹6-₹8 per ₹1,000 of sum assured per month. For ₹5L coverage, monthly premium is around ₹300-₹400.
features: No waiting period for accidental injuries
health_insurance.benefits: Premium eligible for tax deduction under Section 80D, annual health checkups

motor_insurance.name: Car Insurance
motor_insurance.nature: Vehicle protection for third-party liability and own damage
motor_insurance.intended_for: Car owners and drivers seeking mandatory and comprehensive auto cover

types.third_party: Covers liability to third parties (mandatory), approx ₹2,000-5,000/year
types.comprehensive: Covers own vehicle damage + third party liability, approx ₹3,000-8,000/year

motor_insurance.coverage: Third party liability and own damage up to vehicle value
motor_insurance.premium_calculation: Premium depends on vehicle age, make, model, insured declared value, and add-on covers like zero depreciation.
features: Zero depreciation cover for first 5 years
motor_insurance.benefits: Mandatory by Indian Motor Vehicles Act and protects against accident, theft, and third-party liability

home_insurance.name: Home/Property Insurance
home_insurance.nature: Protection for home structure and personal belongings
home_insurance.intended_for: Homeowners and tenants seeking coverage for fire, theft, and natural disasters
home_insurance.coverage: Building and contents, including fixtures and personal belongings
home_insurance.premium_calculation: Premium is based on the reconstructed value of the property, location, and risk factors like flood or earthquake zones.
home_insurance.sum_assured: Building replacement cost plus contents coverage
features: Coverage against fire, theft, natural disasters
home_insurance.benefits: Protects your home investment and may offer tax advantages via optional riders

travel_insurance.name: Travel Insurance
travel_insurance.nature: Trip protection for medical emergencies, delays and lost baggage
travel_insurance.intended_for: Domestic and international travelers seeking emergency and trip protection
travel_insurance.coverage: Medical expenses, trip delays or cancellations, lost baggage, passport assistance
travel_insurance.premium_calculation: Premium depends on trip duration, destination, age of traveler, and sum assured.
travel_insurance.benefits: Affordable peace of mind for domestic and international travels

critical_illness_insurance.name: Critical Illness Insurance
critical_illness_insurance.nature: Lump-sum cover for major illness diagnosis
critical_illness_insurance.intended_for: Individuals looking for financial support in case of serious illness diagnosis
critical_illness_insurance.premium_calculation: Premium is based on age, health profile, sum assured, and covered illnesses.
critical_illness_insurance.illnesses_covered: 40+ critical illnesses including cancer, heart attack, stroke, kidney failure, organ transplant
features: Lump sum payout upon diagnosis (no deduction)
Early detection benefit rider (50% of sum assured)
critical_illness_insurance.benefits: Financially secure during recovery, covers treatment costs

endowment_plans.name: Endowment Insurance Plans
endowment_plans.nature: Savings-focused life cover with maturity benefits
endowment_plans.intended_for: Individuals seeking disciplined savings with life protection
endowment_plans.premium_calculation: Premium depends on policy term, sum assured, age, and bonuses declared by the insurer.
features: Life cover during policy tenure (1-2x premium)
Policy loan facility (up to 80% of surrender value)
endowment_plans.benefits: Combination of protection and savings with guaranteed returns, tax benefits

child_education_plans.name: Child Education Insurance
child_education_plans.nature: Savings and protection plan for future education expenses
child_education_plans.intended_for: Parents who want a disciplined savings plan for their child’s education
child_education_plans.coverage: Educational expenses and protected maturity benefit
child_education_plans.premium_calculation: Premium is based on child’s age, expected payout, policy term, and riders selected.
features: Partial withdrawal for college fees (after 5 years)
child_education_plans.benefits: Secure education funding for child, tax benefits under 80C

personal_accident_insurance.name: Personal Accident Insurance
personal_accident_insurance.nature: Protection against accidental death, disability, and medical expenses
personal_accident_insurance.intended_for: Individuals seeking financial support for accidents at work or during travel
personal_accident_insurance.coverage: Accidental death, permanent/temporary disability, and medical treatment
personal_accident_insurance.premium_calculation: Premium depends on chosen sum assured, occupation risk, and policy term.
features: Temporary disability benefit (₹100/day for 365 days max)
personal_accident_insurance.benefits: Comprehensive accident coverage with high claim ratio
